settings.title: Settings
settings.medicalDisclaimerContent:
Deep Sleep (hereinafter "App") is not a medical device or medical service. All features provided by the App are for general health information and wellness purposes only.

1. Sleep Tracking and Sleep Debt
Sleep duration records, sleep debt scores, and sleep statistics provided by the App are estimates based on accelerometer data and do not replace medical polysomnography (PSG). Sleep debt values are estimates based on scientific research, and the actual amount of sleep needed may vary depending on individual health conditions.

2. Smart Alarm
The smart alarm's sleep stage detection uses only accelerometer-based estimation and does not guarantee medical-grade accuracy. Accelerometer-based sleep stage classification has a limited accuracy of approximately 55-65%. Please be aware these are "estimates" only.

3. Snoring Detection
This feature is for informational purposes only and is not a diagnostic tool for sleep apnea or other sleep disorders. If you experience persistent heavy snoring or suspect breathing difficulties during sleep, please consult a medical professional.

4. Breathing Guide
Breathing exercises are general relaxation techniques and are not intended to treat specific medical conditions. If you have respiratory, cardiovascular, or anxiety disorders, please consult a doctor before doing breathing exercises.

5. Professional Medical Consultation Recommended
• If you experience persistent sleep deprivation or sleep disorders, please consult a sleep specialist.
• Do not delay professional medical consultation or take medical action based on information from the App.
• All figures, analyses, and recommendations provided by the App are for reference only and do not replace medical advice.

6. Limitation of Liability
The App developer is not liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from personal health decisions based on information provided by the App.

Effective Date: April 8, 2026
settings.termsContent:
Article 1 (Purpose)
These Terms of Service set forth the conditions and procedures for using the services provided by Deep Sleep (hereinafter "App").

Article 2 (Services)
The App provides users with the following services:
• Sleep sound mixing: Create personalized sleep environments by combining 100 natural/ambient sounds
• Sleep timer: Auto-stop after a set duration (with fade-out)
• Presets: Save and share sound mixes
• Alarms: Fade-in alarms, math dismiss challenges, snooze
• AI sleep recommendations: Sound recommendations based on user mood descriptions (Plus only)
• Sleep tracking: Accelerometer-based sleep duration recording and statistics
• Breathing guide: Breathing pattern guidance for sleep relaxation
By agreeing to these terms, users may use the services.

Article 3 (Subscriptions and Payments)
• Premium features are available through paid subscriptions (monthly, yearly, lifetime).
• Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
• Payments are processed through your Google Play account.
• To cancel a subscription, go to Google Play Store > Subscriptions.
• After a free trial ends, the subscription automatically converts to paid. No charges apply if cancelled during the trial.

Article 4 (Refund Policy)
Refunds are subject to Google Play Store's refund policy. Refunds cannot be processed within the app; please contact Google Play Customer Support.

Article 5 (Privacy)
The App values your privacy and processes personal information in accordance with its separate Privacy Policy. For details, please refer to the Privacy Policy in the App.

Article 6 (Intellectual Property)
• All sounds, designs, and software contained in the App are the intellectual property of the developer or used under valid licenses.
• Users may use App content only for personal, non-commercial purposes. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or modification is prohibited.

Article 7 (Service Changes and Interruptions)
The App may modify or temporarily suspend services. For significant changes, users will be notified in advance via in-app notice or email.

Article 8 (Medical Disclaimer)
The App is not a medical device. Sleep tracking, snoring detection, sleep debt figures, and similar features are informational estimates only. They do not replace medical diagnosis or treatment. For health concerns, please consult a qualified medical professional. For details, please refer to the Medical Disclaimer.

Article 9 (Disclaimer)
The App is not liable for:
• Damages caused by user negligence
• Damages caused by third-party infringement
• Service interruptions due to force majeure, system failures, etc.
• Damages resulting from health decisions based on App information

Article 10 (Governing Law and Jurisdiction)
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea. Any disputes shall be under the exclusive jurisdiction of the Seoul Central District Court.

Effective Date: April 8, 2026
settings.privacyContent:
Deep Sleep (hereinafter "App") takes your privacy seriously and processes personal information as follows.

1. Personal Information Collected
The App may collect the following information to provide and improve services:
• Device information: device model, OS version, app version
• Usage statistics: app usage patterns, feature usage frequency (in de-identified form)
• Subscription information: payment status (processed through Google Play)
• Sleep data: sleep duration, sleep quality scores, sleep debt (stored on device only)
• Sensor data: accelerometer data (during sleep tracking, stored on device only, never transmitted to servers)

2. Purpose of Use
Collected information is used for the following purposes:
• Providing and maintaining app services
• Providing sleep statistics and reports
• Improving app performance and fixing bugs
• Managing subscription status
• Analysis for improving user experience

3. Audio Data Processing
When using the snoring detection feature:
• All audio analysis is performed 100% on-device (locally).
• Original recording data is deleted immediately after analysis.
• Snoring detection clips (up to 30 seconds) are stored locally on the device only with user consent.
• Audio recording data is never transmitted to external servers.

4. Retention and Disposal
• Sleep data, presets, alarms, and all user data are stored locally on the device.
• All data stored on the device is deleted when the app is uninstalled.
• De-identified statistical data stored on servers is automatically deleted one year after collection.

5. Third-Party Disclosure
The App does not provide personal information to third parties, except as required by law.

6. Advertising
Ads may be displayed to free users through Google AdMob. Google's privacy policy applies. AdMob may collect device advertising identifiers for ad personalization.

7. User Rights
• Users may delete app data or uninstall the app at any time to stop personal information processing.
• Sleep records, snoring recordings, etc. can be deleted directly from the My page.
• Microphone access can be revoked at any time in device settings.

8. Children's Privacy
The App is not intended for children under the age of 14 and does not intentionally collect personal information from children.

9. Contact
For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at the email below.
Email: support@deepsleep.app

Effective Date: April 8, 2026
